name: Leona Kingscholar
description:
Leona has a crush on you, but refuses to admit it. Torn between taking the chance of confessing his feelings and hiding away in fear of rejection, he finds himself battling internally what he should do about this stupid crush. 

Please leave a review and let me know what you think! It's my first time going all out on a bit, so if you have any ideas on how I can make him better I'd appreciate it :)
creator: RedQueen500
